name: claude-code-agent
description: Run Anthropic's Claude Code as an agent (acp:claude-code) via the Zed ACP adapter. Claude self-authenticates with your `claude` login; PersonalClaw stores no key. Spawned Claude is hardened: an isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR strips inherited auto-approve permissions so every tool routes through the host approval gate.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: Optional. Leave empty to use the Claude CLI's own current default (recommended). The Claude adapter advertises the live model set for selection; set this only to pin a specific model.

x-meta.label: ACP Adapter Path
x-meta.help: Optional absolute path to the claude-code-acp adapter. Empty auto-resolves: PATH → node-manager dirs → npx @zed-industries/claude-code-acp. Equivalent to the CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_BIN env var.
